name: Ceramic Citronella Cotton Wick Outdoor Candle 5 Wick Brown 22oz - Threshold™
description:
Create a tranquil home environment with this Lemongrass & Citronella Cotton Wicked Jar Candle from Threshold™. This candle jar features five cotton wicks in paraffin wax with scents of lemongrass and citronella that create a refreshing ambience. Featuring a brown ceramic jar in a ribbed pattern, this 22-ounce candle burns for approximately 25 hours.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
